tool_args.label: Staff Summary - Mortgage Recording Tax Escalation Payments

payload.title: Staff Summary – Mortgage Recording Tax – Escalation Payments to Dutchess, Orange and Rockland Counties
payload.description: Staff summary regarding statutorily required MRT-2 escalator payments to Dutchess, Orange and Rockland counties totaling $9,176,327.41 expected to be paid in March 2026.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.scope: Dutchess, Orange and Rockland counties combined

payload.claim_text: Dutchess and Orange Counties are each to receive no less than $1.5 million annually
payload.subject: Dutchess and Orange Counties

payload.claim_text: The escalator payment is based on the percentage by which total MRT-1 and MRT-2 receipts attributable to such county exceeds the receipts received in 1989 from such county
payload.description: Statutory escalator payment formula

evidence_refs.source_quote: the statute provides for an 'escalator payment' based on the percentage by which total MRT-1 and MRT-2 receipts attributable to such county exceeds the receipts received in 1989 from such county

payload.claim_text: Pursuant to PAL §1270-a (4)(c), the MRT-1 increase is to be calculated as if the MRT-1 tax was 25 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded and not the current 30 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded
payload.description: MRT-1 calculation adjustment for escalator determination

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pursuant to PAL §1270-a (4)(c), the MRT-1 increase is to be calculated as if the MRT-1 tax was 25 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded and not the current 30 cents per $100 of mortgage recorded

payload.claim_text: Payments are made from funds established by PAL §1270-a, the Metropolitan Transportation Authority Special Assistance Fund, from which monies are transferred to the Metropolitan Transportation Authority Dutchess, Orange and Rockland Fund created by PAL §1270-b
payload.description: Statutory fund structure for MRT-2 payments

evidence_refs.source_quote: These payments are made from funds established by PAL §1270-a, the Metropolitan Transportation Authority Special Assistance Fund, from which monies are transferred to the Metropolitan Transportation Authority Dutchess, Orange and Rockland Fund created by PAL §1270-b

payload.claim_text: The escalator payment is based on the percentage by which total MRT-1 and MRT-2 receipts attributable to such county exceeds the receipts received in 1989 from such county
payload.description: Statutory escalator payment formula

evidence_refs.source_quote: In addition to providing these minimum mass transportation operating assistance payments, the statute provides for an “escalator payment” based on the percentage by which total MRT-1 and MRT-2 receipts attributable to such county exceeds the receipts received in 1989 from such county
